channel.title: Dracut --force --regenerate-all will give "libkmod: ERROR: kmod_module_parse_depline: ctx=0x584cfad876d0..."
channel.description:
KS on direct hardware.
``` [sysmaint ~]% sudo dracut --force --regenerate-all libkmod: ERROR: kmod_module_parse_depline: ctx=0x584cfad876d0 path=/lib/modules/6.12.74+deb13+1-amd64//kernel/sound/core/seq/snd-seq.ko.xz error=No such file or directory libkmod: ERROR: kmod_module_parse_depline: ctx=0x584cfad876d0 path=/lib/modules/6.12.74+deb13+1-amd64//kernel/sound/core/snd-timer.ko.xz error=No such file or directory libkmod: ERROR: kmod_module_parse_depline: ctx=0x584cfad876d0 path=/lib/modules/6.12.74+deb13+1-amd64//kernel/sound/core/snd-seq-device.ko.xz error=No such file or directory libkmod: ERROR: kmod_module_parse_depline: ctx=0x584cfad876d0 path=/lib/modules/6.12.74+deb13+1-amd64//kernel/sound/core/snd.ko.xz error=No such file or directory libkmod: ERROR: kmod_module_parse_depline: ctx=0x584cfad876d0 path=/lib/modules/6.12.74+deb13+1-amd64//kernel/sound/core/snd.ko.xz error=No such file or directory libkmod: ERROR: kmod_module_parse_depline: ctx=0x584cfad876d0 path=/lib/modules/6.12.74+deb13+1-amd64//kernel/sound/soc/intel/boards/snd-soc-intel-sof-board-helpers.ko.xz error=No such file or directory libkmod: ERROR: kmod_module_parse_depline: ctx=0x584cfad876d0 path=/lib/modules/6.12.74+deb13+1-amd64//kernel/sound/soc/intel/boards/snd-soc-intel-hda-dsp-common.ko.xz error=No such file or directory libkmod: ERROR: kmod_module_parse_depline: ctx=0x584cfad876d0 path=/lib/modules/6.12.74+deb13+1-amd64//kernel/sound/pci/hda/snd-hda-codec.ko.xz error=No such file or directory libkmod: ERROR: kmod_module_parse_depline: ctx=0x584cfad876d0 path=/lib/modules/6.12.74+deb13+1-amd64//kernel/sound/soc/sof/snd-sof.ko.xz error=No such file or directory libkmod: ERROR: kmod_module_parse_depline: ctx=0x584cfad876d0 path=/lib/modules/6.12.74+deb13+1-amd64//kernel/drivers/gpu/drm/drm_gpuvm.ko.xz error=No such file or directory libkmod: ERROR: kmod_module_parse_depline: ctx=0x584cfad876d0 path=/lib/modules/6.12.74+deb13+1-amd64//kernel/drivers/scsi/scsi_mod.ko.xz error=No such file or directory libkmod: ERROR: kmod_module_parse_depline: ctx=0x584cfad876d0 path=/lib/modules/6.12.74+deb13+1-amd64//kernel/drivers/hid/i2c-hid/i2c-hid.ko.xz error=No such file or directory libkmod: ERROR: kmod_module_parse_depline: ctx=0x584cfad876d0 path=/lib/modules/6.12.74+deb13+1-amd64//kernel/drivers/nvme/host/nvme-core.ko.xz error=No such file or directory libkmod: ERROR: kmod_module_parse_depline: ctx=0x584cfad876d0 path=/lib/modules/6.12.74+deb13+1-amd64//kernel/drivers/usb/core/usbcore.ko.xz error=No such file or directory libkmod: ERROR: kmod_module_parse_depline: ctx=0x584cfad876d0 path=/lib/modules/6.12.74+deb13+1-amd64//kernel/drivers/usb/typec/ucsi/typec_ucsi.ko.xz error=No such file or directory libkmod: ERROR: kmod_module_parse_depline: ctx=0x584cfad876d0 path=/lib/modules/6.12.74+deb13+1-amd64//kernel/drivers/hid/hid.ko.xz error=No such file or directory libkmod: ERROR: kmod_module_parse_depline: ctx=0x584cfad876d0 path=/lib/modules/6.12.74+deb13+1-amd64//kernel/crypto/cryptd.ko.xz error=No such file or directory libkmod: ERROR: kmod_module_parse_depline: ctx=0x584cfad876d0 path=/lib/modules/6.12.74+deb13+1-amd64//kernel/drivers/mfd/intel-lpss.ko.xz error=No such file or directory libkmod: ERROR: kmod_module_parse_depline: ctx=0x584cfad876d0 path=/lib/modules/6.12.74+deb13+1-amd64//kernel/drivers/usb/typec/typec.ko.xz error=No such file or directory libkmod: ERROR: kmod_module_parse_depline: ctx=0x584cfad876d0 path=/lib/modules/6.12.74+deb13+1-amd64//kernel/drivers/scsi/scsi_common.ko.xz error=No such file or directory libkmod: ERROR: kmod_module_parse_depline: ctx=0x584cfad876d0 path=/lib/modules/6.12.74+deb13+1-amd64//kernel/drivers/nvme/common/nvme-auth.ko.xz error=No such file or directory libkmod: ERROR: kmod_module_parse_depline: ctx=0x584cfad876d0 path=/lib/modules/6.12.74+deb13+1-amd64//kernel/drivers/usb/common/usb-common.ko.xz error=No such file or directory libkmod: ERROR: kmod_module_parse_depline: ctx=0x584cfad876d0 path=/lib/modules/6.12.74+deb13+1-amd64//kernel/drivers/platform/x86/wmi.ko.xz error=No such file or directory libkmod: ERROR: kmod_module_parse_depline: ctx=0x584cfad876d0 path=/lib/modules/6.12.74+deb13+1-amd64//kernel/drivers/md/dm-region-hash.ko.xz error=No such file or directory libkmod: ERROR: kmod_module_parse_depline: ctx=0x584cfad876d0 path=/lib/modules/6.12.74+deb13+1-amd64//kernel/drivers/md/dm-log.ko.xz error=No such file or directory libkmod: ERROR: kmod_module_parse_depline: ctx=0x584cfad876d0 path=/lib/modules/6.12.74+deb13+1-amd64//kernel/drivers/md/dm-mod.ko.xz error=No such file or directory libkmod: ERROR: kmod_module_parse_depline: ctx=0x584cfad876d0 path=/lib/modules/6.12.74+deb13+1-amd64//kernel/lib/crypto/gf128mul.ko.xz error=No such file or directory libkmod: ERROR: kmod_module_parse_depline: ctx=0x584cfad876d0 path=/lib/modules/6.12.74+deb13+1-amd64//kernel/crypto/cryptd.ko.xz error=No such file or directory dracut[I]: Executing: /usr/bin/dracut --kver=6.12.74+deb13+1-amd64 --force dracut[F]: Can't write to /boot/efi/846b9587b808496b93ddf08c8c297f47/6.12.74+deb13+1-amd64: Directory /boot/efi/846b9587b808496b93ddf08c8c297f47/6.12.74+deb13+1-amd64 does not exist or is not accessible. dracut[I]: Executing: /usr/bin/dracut --kver=6.12.85+deb13-amd64 --force dracut[I]: 62bluetooth: Could not find any command of '/usr/lib/bluetooth/bluetoothd /usr/libexec/bluetooth/bluetoothd'! dracut[I]: 62bluetooth: Could not find any command of '/usr/lib/bluetooth/bluetoothd /usr/libexec/bluetooth/bluetoothd'! ```
Nothing special done, just needed this command [for nvidia test](https://forums.kicksecure.com/t/kicksecure-broken-kernel-panic-with-nvidia-drm-modeset-1-fbdev-1-discrete-mode/1727), always reproducible.

item.title: Dracut --force --regenerate-all will give "libkmod: ERROR: kmod_module_parse_depline: ctx=0x584cfad876d0..."
item.dc:creator: arraybolt3
item.description:
Lots of missing modules… maybe you have a linux image package for an older kernel installed but the corresponding linux modules package isn’t installed?

Read full topic
item.source: Dracut --force --regenerate-all will give "libkmod: ERROR: kmod_module_parse_depline: ctx=0x584cfad876d0..."

item.title: Dracut --force --regenerate-all will give "libkmod: ERROR: kmod_module_parse_depline: ctx=0x584cfad876d0..."
item.dc:creator: nurmagoz
item.description:
KS on direct hardware.

[sysmaint ~]% sudo dracut --force --regenerate-all
libkmod: ERROR: kmod_module_parse_depline: ctx=0x584cfad876d0 path=/lib/modules/6.12.74+deb13+1-amd64//kernel/sound/core/seq/snd-seq.ko.xz error=No such file or directory
libkmod: ERROR: kmod_module_parse_depline: ctx=0x584cfad876d0 path=/lib/modules/6.12.74+deb13+1-amd64//kernel/sound/core/snd-timer.ko.xz error=No such file or directory
libkmod: ERROR: kmod_module_parse_depline: ctx=0x584cfad876d0 path=/lib/modules/6.12.74+deb13+1-amd64//kernel/sound/core/snd-seq-device.ko.xz error=No such file or directory
libkmod: ERROR: kmod_module_parse_depline: ctx=0x584cfad876d0 path=/lib/modules/6.12.74+deb13+1-amd64//kernel/sound/core/snd.ko.xz error=No such file or directory
libkmod: ERROR: kmod_module_parse_depline: ctx=0x584cfad876d0 path=/lib/modules/6.12.74+deb13+1-amd64//kernel/sound/core/snd.ko.xz error=No such file or directory
libkmod: ERROR: kmod_module_parse_depline: ctx=0x584cfad876d0 path=/lib/modules/6.12.74+deb13+1-amd64//kernel/sound/soc/intel/boards/snd-soc-intel-sof-board-helpers.ko.xz error=No such file or directory
libkmod: ERROR: kmod_module_parse_depline: ctx=0x584cfad876d0 path=/lib/modules/6.12.74+deb13+1-amd64//kernel/sound/soc/intel/boards/snd-soc-intel-hda-dsp-common.ko.xz error=No such file or directory
libkmod: ERROR: kmod_module_parse_depline: ctx=0x584cfad876d0 path=/lib/modules/6.12.74+deb13+1-amd64//kernel/sound/pci/hda/snd-hda-codec.ko.xz error=No such file or directory

dracut[I]: 62bluetooth: Could not find any command of '/usr/lib/bluetooth/bluetoothd /usr/libexec/bluetooth/bluetoothd'!
dracut[I]: 62bluetooth: Could not find any command of '/usr/lib/bluetooth/bluetoothd /usr/libexec/bluetooth/bluetoothd'!

Nothing special done, just needed this command for nvidia test, always reproducible.

Read full topic
item.source: Dracut --force --regenerate-all will give "libkmod: ERROR: kmod_module_parse_depline: ctx=0x584cfad876d0..."
